productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Crkt Col Pant Black Trackpant
description: Composition Black tracks made of 100% polyester ClimaLite fabric, with elasticated waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, white stripes on contoured panel that runs along the back and down the side seams and brand name embroidered on the left leg Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Do not dryclean Made of ClimaLite fabric, these adidas tracks are ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The ClimaLite fabric wick moisture from the skin to the fabrics surface for easy evaporation. Pair it with sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
